_note: Rules + stratagems ported from the legacy reference (accurate). Enhancements are PLACEHOLDERS — replace name/pts/text with real codex values (verified:false until you do).

detachments.name: Skysplinter Assault
detachments.ruleText: Each time a DRUKHARI unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn: ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability, and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lance] ability.

stratagems.name: Vicious Blades
stratagems.effect: Just after a DRUKHARI TRANSPORT selects its targets: after it fights, select one targeted enemy unit. Roll D6 for each embarked model (+1 if WRACKS): each 5+ inflicts 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Wraithlike Retreat
stratagems.effect: One DRUKHARI INFANTRY unit that fought makes a Normal or Fall Back move. Unless WYCHES, it must end within 3" horizontal / 5" vertical of a friendly DRUKHARI TRANSPORT and embark within it.

stratagems.name: Pounce on the Prey
stratagems.effect: Just after a DRUKHARI INFANTRY unit disembarks from a TRANSPORT that made a Normal move: until end of turn, that unit is eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Annihilation
stratagems.effect: One DRUKHARI unit that hasn't shot this phase and disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn gains [Sustained Hits 1] on ranged weapons (or [Sustained Hits 2] if KABALITE WARRIORS or HAND OF THE ARCHON).

stratagems.name: Swooping Mockery
stratagems.effect: Just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move: one DRUKHARI TRANSPORT within 9" makes a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Night Shield
stratagems.effect: Just after an enemy selects targets: one DRUKHARI VEHICLE unit targeted gains a 4+ invulnerable save until end of phase.

detachments.name: Reaper's Wager
detachments.ruleText: At the start of the battle, DRUKHARI units are winning the wager. Each time a DRUKHARI unit destroys an enemy unit, DRUKHARI units are winning; each time a HARLEQUINS unit destroys an enemy unit, HARLEQUINS units are winning (the other faction is losing). Each time a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS model makes an attack: if winning the wager, re-roll a Hit roll of 1; if losing, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 AND a Wound roll of 1 instead.

stratagems.name: Malicious Frenzy
stratagems.effect: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit that hasn't shot or fought this phase: select [Lethal Hits] or [Sustained Hits 1]. Until end of phase, that unit's weapons have the selected ability.

stratagems.name: Fateful Role
stratagems.effect: Just after an enemy selects targets: one targeted DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit — each time a model is destroyed without having fought, roll D6 (+1 if losing the wager): on 4+ that model fights before removal.

stratagems.name: Murderer's Circus
stratagems.effect: Just after an enemy selects targets: one targeted DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit — until end of phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Shorten the Odds
stratagems.effect: Just after a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit Advances: until end of turn, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Scintillating Tempo
stratagems.effect: Just after a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit moves, is set up, or declares a charge: until end of turn, enemies cannot use Fire Overwatch to shoot at your unit.

stratagems.name: Dance Macabre
stratagems.effect: Just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move: one DRUKHARI INFANTRY or HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit within 9" makes a Normal move of up to D6" (or 6" if losing the wager).
